calamities to or death of celebrated monarchs; and people would be
tortured by the dread of famine, mortality and drought.
Should an earthquake occur in the Varuna Circle and Indra
Period or vice versa, there would be plenty of food crops, prosperity,
rain and joy and contentment in the world. Cows would yield milk
in abundance and kings sink their differences.

When the time of fruition of the effects of portents or extra-
ordinary happenings such as throbbing of limbs, and the like has
not been specified, they will be felt within two months, provided
such happenings take place in the Wind Circle; within three fort-
